hero.subtitle: AI-Powered Solutions for Customer Engagement
hero.description: Transform your business with cutting-edge AI automation for customer engagement, website optimization, and automated sales booking.

home.servicesSubtitle: Revolutionize your business operations with intelligent automation
home.appointmentDesc: Professional training to optimally deploy AI. From basic prompting to advanced strategies for businesses and individuals.
home.customerDesc: AI-driven chatbots that understand, respond, and engage your customers 24/7 with human-like conversations and automated interactions.
home.websiteDesc: Intelligent algorithms that analyze user behavior and optimize your website for maximum conversion and performance.
home.featuresDesc: Our AI-powered platform leverages cutting-edge machine learning and natural language processing to deliver intelligent automation that scales with your business.
home.quotation: Like Sherlock Holmes, we see patterns others miss — and turn them into intelligent automation.
home.ctaDesc: Join leading companies that trust Neuritas-AI to automate their customer engagement and drive growth.

aiTraining.description: Learn how to optimally deploy AI in your business or daily life. From basic concepts to advanced strategies — we make the AI world accessible to everyone.
aiTraining.introductionDesc: Our company offers professional AI training to businesses and individuals to help them navigate the world of artificial intelligence. Whether you're just starting or want to deepen your knowledge, we have the perfect training for you.
aiTraining.simpleTrainingDesc: Learn the basics of AI: how to prompt effectively, which AI tools exist, and how to apply them practically in your daily work. Perfect for beginners who want to get started quickly.
aiTraining.advancedTrainingDesc: In-depth knowledge about how AI works, how it "thinks", what analyses it can perform, and strategies for optimal deployment within your organization. For professionals who want to use AI strategically.
aiTraining.customizationNote: All trainings can be fully customized to the specific needs of your business or individual learning goals.
aiTraining.benefit1Desc: Learn how AI can accelerate and automate your work, giving you more time for important tasks.
aiTraining.benefit2Desc: Understand how AI analyzes data and provides insights that lead to smarter, data-driven decisions.
aiTraining.benefit3Desc: Discover AI tools and techniques that optimize your workflow and eliminate repetitive tasks.
aiTraining.faq1Question: How long does a training last?
aiTraining.faq1Answer: Our trainings range from 1 to 2 hours, depending on the chosen level and topics. We always adapt the duration to your needs.
aiTraining.faq2Question: What do I need for the training?
aiTraining.faq2Answer: You only need a smartphone for the practical exercises. We provide all other materials and access to the necessary AI tools during the training.
aiTraining.faq3Answer: After the training, you will be better equipped to use AI tools, better informed about the advantages and disadvantages of AI, and know exactly how to apply AI daily in your work or business.
aiTraining.ctaDesc: Book your customized AI training today and discover how artificial intelligence can transform your work.

appointmentSetting.description: Streamline your sales process with intelligent appointment booking that automatically schedules, manages, and follows up with leads.
appointmentSetting.feature1Desc: AI agents that understand your availability and optimize appointments based on priority and schedule.
appointmentSetting.feature2Desc: Never lose a lead with automated reminders and follow-up messages that drive conversions.
appointmentSetting.feature3Desc: Seamless sync with Google Calendar, Outlook, and other popular scheduling platforms.
appointmentSetting.feature4Desc: Automated reminders for both you and your clients to reduce no-shows.
appointmentSetting.benefit1: Save up to 15 hours per week on scheduling tasks
appointmentSetting.benefit2: Increase show-up rate by 40% with smart reminders
appointmentSetting.benefit3: Reduce administrative costs with automated workflows
appointmentSetting.effortlessBookingDesc: Let AI handle your appointment scheduling while you focus on closing deals. Smart automation that never misses a lead.
appointmentSetting.feat1Desc: AI analyzes calendars, time zones, and availability to automatically book appointments at optimal times for all parties.
appointmentSetting.feat2Desc: Leads are engaged immediately with automated responses and booking options, maximizing conversion rates.
appointmentSetting.feat3Desc: Automated reminders and follow-up sequences ensure no appointment is missed and engagement stays high.
appointmentSetting.feat4Desc: Seamlessly integrates with Google Calendar, Outlook, and other popular calendar platforms.

aiVoiceCaller.description: Automate your phone calls with AI. Our Voice Caller conducts professional conversations on behalf of your company, schedules appointments, and saves you valuable time.
aiVoiceCaller.introductionDesc: The AI Voice Caller is a revolutionary service that conducts phone calls without requiring any human from your company. Perfect for scheduling appointments, following up on leads, and customer service — 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
aiVoiceCaller.whatIsDesc: AI Voice Caller is an advanced AI-powered telephony service that calls on behalf of your company. With natural speech recognition and intelligent conversation flow, the AI can independently conduct conversations, answer questions, and schedule appointments directly in your calendar.
aiVoiceCaller.function1Desc: The AI conducts complete phone conversations with your customers, answers questions, and gathers information — without human intervention.
aiVoiceCaller.function2Desc: Appointments are automatically scheduled in your company's calendar, with confirmations and reminders for both parties.
aiVoiceCaller.featuresTitle: What Can AI Voice Caller Do?
aiVoiceCaller.feature1Desc: Advanced speech technology ensures human-like conversations that customers cannot distinguish from real employees.
aiVoiceCaller.feature2Desc: Automatically schedule appointments based on availability, with direct synchronization to your business calendar.
aiVoiceCaller.feature3Desc: Save hours per week by automating routine phone calls and focus on more important tasks.
aiVoiceCaller.feature4Desc: Boost your team's productivity by relieving human resources from repetitive calling tasks.
aiVoiceCaller.benefit1Desc: Your business is reachable day and night for customers, without additional staff.
aiVoiceCaller.benefit2Desc: Automatic confirmations and reminders ensure no appointment is forgotten.
aiVoiceCaller.benefit3Desc: Every customer receives the same professional experience, regardless of time or busy periods.
aiVoiceCaller.ctaDesc: Discover how AI Voice Caller can transform your business. Request a demo and experience the power of automated phone calls.

chatbots.description: Discover the power of AI chatbots that support your customers 24/7, respond automatically, and gather valuable insights.
chatbots.introductionDesc: A chatbot is your digital assistant that never sleeps. With advanced artificial intelligence, our chatbots understand your customers' intentions, provide accurate answers, and build meaningful conversations — all without human intervention.
chatbots.whatIsChatbotDesc: A chatbot is an AI-powered conversational agent that automatically communicates with your customers via text or voice. Our advanced chatbots use natural language processing and machine learning to understand questions, interpret context, and deliver personalized responses that truly help customers.
chatbots.capability1Desc: Answers questions about products, services, opening hours, and company information directly and accurately.
chatbots.capability2Desc: Guides visitors through your website, helps them find the right product, and supports decision-making.
chatbots.capability3Desc: Collects valuable data about customer behavior, preferences, and frequently asked questions to improve your service.
chatbots.feature1Desc: Advanced NLP enables human-like conversations that understand context, sentiment, and intent to provide meaningful responses.
chatbots.feature2Desc: Never miss a customer interaction. Our AI operates around the clock, ensuring instant responses regardless of time zones.
chatbots.feature3Desc: Machine learning adapts to each customer's preferences, history, and behavior for truly personalized engagement.
chatbots.feature4Desc: Our AI continuously learns from interactions, improving responses and understanding customer needs over time.
chatbots.feature5Desc: AI analyzes calendars, time zones, and availability to automatically book appointments at the best times for all parties.
chatbots.feature6Desc: Automated reminders and follow-up processes ensure no appointment is missed and engagement remains high.
chatbots.feature7Desc: Leads are immediately engaged with automated responses and booking options, maximizing conversion rates.
chatbots.feature8Desc: Collects and analyzes conversation data to provide valuable insights for business optimization and strategic decisions.
chatbots.ctaDesc: Each chatbot is specially developed for your unique business needs. Pricing varies depending on functionality, integrations, and processing volume. Contact us for a personalized consultation and custom quote.

customerEngagement.description: Transform customer interactions with AI-powered engagement that understands, responds, and builds lasting relationships 24/7.
customerEngagement.sectionDesc: Our AI-powered customer engagement platform delivers personalized, intelligent interactions that feel human while operating at machine scale.
customerEngagement.feature1Desc: Advanced NLP enables human-like conversations that understand context, sentiment, and intent to provide meaningful responses.
customerEngagement.feature2Desc: Never miss a customer interaction. Our AI operates around the clock, ensuring instant responses regardless of time zones.
customerEngagement.feature3Desc: Machine learning adapts to each customer's preferences, history, and behavior for truly personalized engagement.
customerEngagement.feature4Desc: Our AI continuously learns from interactions, improving responses and understanding customer needs over time.

websiteOptimization.description: Maximize your website's potential with AI-driven analytics and optimization that continuously improves performance and conversions.
websiteOptimization.feature1Desc: AI-driven insights into website speed, SEO, and user experience for optimal performance.
websiteOptimization.feature2Desc: Increase conversion rates with data-driven recommendations for layout and content.
websiteOptimization.feature3Desc: Automated experiments to discover what works best for your audience.
websiteOptimization.feature4Desc: 24/7 monitoring of website performance with instant alerts for issues.
websiteOptimization.benefit1: Increase website speed by up to 50% for better user experience
websiteOptimization.benefit2: Improve SEO rankings with AI-driven content optimization
websiteOptimization.benefit3: Boost conversion rates by 30% with data-driven insights
websiteOptimization.benefit4: Reduce bounce rate with personalized user experiences
websiteOptimization.step1Desc: AI scans your website for improvement opportunities
websiteOptimization.maximizePerformanceDesc: Transform your website into a high-performing conversion machine with intelligent optimization powered by advanced AI algorithms.
websiteOptimization.feat1Desc: Deep insights into user behavior, traffic patterns, and engagement metrics with AI-powered predictive analytics.
websiteOptimization.feat2Desc: Continuous monitoring and optimization of page load times, resource usage, and overall site performance.
websiteOptimization.feat3Desc: AI-driven A/B testing and personalization to maximize conversions and user engagement.
websiteOptimization.feat4Desc: Machine learning automatically identifies and implements optimization opportunities without manual intervention.

about.description: We're on a mission to transform how businesses operate through intelligent AI automation that scales with your ambition.
about.missionText: Our mission is to make AI technology accessible and practical for businesses of all sizes. We believe every organization should benefit from the power of automation and intelligent decision-making.
about.visionText: We envision a future where AI seamlessly integrates with business processes, enabling teams to focus on creativity and strategic growth while routine tasks are intelligently automated.
about.value1Desc: We stay at the forefront of AI technology, implementing the latest advancements for our clients.
about.value2Desc: We're honest about what AI can and cannot do, building trust with our clients.
about.value3Desc: We focus on measurable business outcomes, ensuring our solutions deliver real value.
about.value4Desc: We stand behind our clients with excellent service and ongoing support.
about.teamText: Our team consists of AI engineers, data scientists, and business strategists with years of experience building intelligent automation solutions. We work closely with our clients to create solutions perfectly tailored to their unique needs.
about.innovationDesc: At Neuritas-AI, we believe the future belongs to businesses that embrace intelligent automation. Founded by a team of AI researchers and business innovators, we've built a platform that doesn't just automate tasks — it thinks, learns, and evolves with your business needs.
about.whatWeDoDesc: We specialize in three core areas that transform how businesses connect with customers:
about.service1Desc: AI that understands and responds to your customers with human-like empathy and precision.
about.service2Desc: Intelligent analytics that continuously improve your digital presence and conversion rates.
about.service3Desc: Smart scheduling systems that turn leads into appointments without manual intervention.
about.ourMissionDesc: To empower businesses of all sizes with enterprise-grade AI automation that's accessible, powerful, and transformative. We're not just building tools — we're building the future of how businesses operate.
about.missionPoint1: Make AI automation accessible to businesses of all sizes
about.missionPoint2: Deliver measurable ROI through intelligent automation
about.missionPoint3: Continuously innovate at the cutting edge of AI technology
about.missionPoint4: Build lasting partnerships with our clients' success
about.discoverHow: Discover how Neuritas-AI can transform your business with intelligent automation.

contact.description: Ready to transform your business with AI automation? Reach out to our team and discover what's possible.
contact.successMessage: We'll get back to you soon.
contact.journeyDesc: Whether you're looking to automate customer engagement, optimize your website, or streamline appointment booking, we're here to help you succeed.
contact.socialDesc: Want to learn more about Neuritas-AI? Follow us on our socials!

footer.tagline: Transforming businesses worldwide with AI solutions
